{"society_power": 7.5, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Compromise of 1877 ends Reconstruction; Redeemer reaction", "reasoning": "Brief gains from the 15th Amendment and Enforcement Acts (both empowering Black civil society and federal enforcement) were reversed by paramilitary terror, adverse Court rulings, Grant-era corruption, and Northern retreat culminating in 1877, disempowering a large regional segment of society and eroding the state's Southern enforcement capacity."}
